title: How to get started with the support kit
abstract: Choose a learning path to get started. Limit search by choosing one learning path, or include all.

title: Module 1: Data Management for Researchers
abstract: Learn how to structure and document your raw research data to meet peer-review standards and open-science policies.

title: Module 2: Open Science and Data Sharing
abstract: Learn how to make your research data findable, accessible, and compliant with open science mandates.

title: Module 3: Long-Term Data Preservation
abstract: The final step focuses on archiving data securely for 10+ years and submitting your final DMP report.

title: Module 1: Data Governance for Managers
abstract: Learn how to manage data access, compliance risk, and team workflows strategically.

title: Module 2: Risk Management and Data Security
abstract: Shift focus toward mitigating risks, handling sensitive data (PII), and implementing cloud security strategies.

title: Module 3: Data-Driven Decision Making
abstract: The final module for managers teaches you how to translate governed data into actionable dashboards and business intelligence.

title: Module 1: Teaching Data Management
abstract: Learn how to transform dry data policies into engaging, memorable lessons for data literacy workshops.

title: Module 2: Curriculum Design for Data Literacy
abstract: Learn how to map out a multi-day training workshop and tailor technical jargon to audiences with varying skill levels.

title: Module 3: Measuring Training Impact
abstract: The final step for trainers focuses on evaluating the long-term success of your workshops and gathering feedback to iterate.
